hook.prompt: Will Maya love this film on Reel? You have examples — what would you guess?
hook.tease: Drag something before anyone explains ML to you.

blocks.body: ML on Reel is pattern completion: past watches → predict the next one.
In "The Blind Taste Test" you'll manipulate a live model — not read about one.
What do you think happens if you change one parameter?

traps.reveal: Perfect train score can still fail on new films — that's the whole game.

realWorld.example: Reel uses testing to decide which shorts surface for millions of viewers — same idea, bigger scale.

miniChallenge.goal: Reach the mastery condition by experimenting with the blind taste test.

bullets: You learned Testing by touching it, not reading it.
Experiment mode is always open — break things on purpose.

steps.prompt: Before changing anything: will accuracy go up or down if you tweak the main slider?
Change a parameter until the model responds.

choices.text: The model found a pattern in Maya's watches

choices.wrongReason: Animations follow your parameter changes — check the metrics.
More relevant data usually helps; irrelevant data hurts.

seo.title: The Blind Taste Test — Wonder ML
seo.description: Interactive lesson: The Blind Taste Test. Learn Testing by experimentation on Reel.
